problem id: 7a4063e6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10100110 -> 01111010
  11101010 -> 01001111
  01111110 -> 00100000
  11011010 -> 01011011
  11001111 -> 11010100
  00010101 -> 10001111
  11000010 -> 01010001
  10100000 -> 01111000
  11001001 -> 11010110
  00010011 -> 10001101

query: 00110111
predicted answer: 10010110
